scripts.backend:test: sh -lc 'if [ -n "$VIRTUAL_ENV" ] && [ -x "$VIRTUAL_ENV/bin/python" ]; then PY="$VIRTUAL_ENV/bin/python"; elif [ -x backend/.venv/bin/python ]; then PY="backend/.venv/bin/python"; else echo "Run npm run backend:sync (or activate a uv-managed virtual environment) before running backend tests."; exit 1; fi; PYTHONPATH=backend/src "$PY" -m unittest discover -s backend/tests'
